title: Bangkok Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bangkok with a Z-Score of +3.34. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bangkok is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 84%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is very low, at 0.3 km/h, which is not providing any relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
